overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character exploring a rainy night scene at a Victorian mansion. The character walks along wooden decking, enters a glass greenhouse gazebo, and approaches the main house interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor wooden patio deck with garden furniture

events.description: approaching the illuminated glass greenhouse structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-soaked wooden deck toward the greenhouse gazebo

entered.detail: rain-soaked wooden planking with outdoor furniture arranged around the perimeter
trees with pink blossoms lining the deck edge
octagonal glass and metal greenhouse structure with warm interior lighting
ornate black metal lantern with warm yellow glow mounted on a post
white wooden chairs and tables scattered on the deck

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked wooden deck at night, passing flowering trees and outdoor furniture. Warm lantern light illuminates the path toward a large glass greenhouse structure glowing in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: glass conservatory with exotic plants and display tables

events.description: entering the greenhouse from the rainy exterior deck
character circles around the central table examining the displayed items

agents.ego_description: entering the greenhouse and walking around the interior to examine the furnishings

entered.detail: clear glass panels with dark metal framing enclosing the conservatory space
round wooden table with various objects and a white cloth covering
warm glowing lanterns hanging from the greenhouse framework
large exotic leafy plants in decorative containers

segments.scene_description: Inside the glass greenhouse, the character explores the warm, dry interior sheltered from the rain. The space features glass walls, a central display table, potted exotic plants, and hanging lanterns. The character circles the table examining items before heading toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden path leading to main house entrance

events.description: exiting the greenhouse back into the rainy garden
approaching the main house porch and entrance steps

agents.ego_description: walking along the garden path from the greenhouse toward the main house entrance

entered.detail: gravel and dirt path winding through landscaped garden beds
large two-story Victorian mansion with illuminated windows and wooden siding
tropical palm trees flanking the approach to the house
covered wooden porch with steps leading to the front entrance

segments.scene_description: The character exits the greenhouse back into the rain and walks along a gravel garden path toward the main house. The Victorian mansion looms ahead with warm light glowing from its windows, flanked by palm trees and ornamental plants.

scene_state.functional_zone: Victorian parlor with antique furniture and display shelves

events.description: entering the main house from the rainy exterior
encountering a stranger standing in the back room

agents.ego_description: entering the house and walking into the front parlor, observing the interior decor

notable_agents.action: man standing in the back room visible through the interior doorway

entered.detail: dimly lit Victorian parlor with patterned carpet and antique furnishings
tall wooden shelves filled with books, curiosities, and decorative objects
wooden counter with various items and a bust sculpture on top
doorway with red curtains leading to another room where a figure stands

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main house, stepping from the rain into a dimly lit Victorian parlor. The room features patterned carpets, wooden display shelves filled with curiosities, and a counter with various objects. Through a doorway at the far end, a stranger stands in the back room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-drenched outdoor terrace into the sheltered, opulent interiors of a Victorian estate. It begins with a walk along a rain-soaked wooden deck illuminated by warm lanterns, moving past flowering trees toward a glowing glass greenhouse. As the character steps inside, the environment shifts from the cold storm to a dry, warm sanctuary filled with exotic potted plants and hanging lights before the camera follows them back out into the rain. The scene then transitions across a gravel garden path flanked by palm trees, approaching the looming mansion as warm light spills from its windows. Finally, the camera enters the main house, moving from the wet exterior into a dimly lit parlor of patterned carpets and curiosities, ending as a stranger appears in a distant room.
